missions.name: Cloud City lift — anchor maintenance manifest 3309
missions.briefing: Operations Bureau, contractor desk. Standing work order: maintenance pass on lower-band atmospheric anchors. Collect listed supply manifest from designated co-orbital body, deliver to anchor grid on approach, file receipt at kiosk on return. Low-complexity. Standard rate. — Operations.

missions.name: Outbound burn — upper-band atmospheric survey
missions.briefing: Operations Bureau. Survey pass, upper-band atmospheric strata. Deploy probes at prescribed hold altitudes, recover telemetry packet before return window closes. No special handling. Standard rate. — Operations.

missions.name: Mineral certification — intake validation
missions.briefing: Operations Bureau. Routine mineral certification request. Analyze local rock samples, file terminal report, recover requested sample for intake validation. Low-complexity. Standard rate. — Operations.

missions.name: Cloud City lift — anchor grid resupply 4471
missions.briefing: Operations Bureau. Atmospheric anchor resupply. Co-orbital body, materials per manifest. Return with confirmation receipt. Low-complexity. Rated standard. — Operations.
